description:
Pull long-form podcast transcripts as speaker-labeled markdown — cookie-first across
the four major paid publishers, free everywhere else, paid only when nothing else
works.

podcast-goat is a synthetic combo CLI. It walks a cookie -> free -> paid dispatch
chain across 10 sources (Huberman / Acquired / Founders / Peter Attia member
cookies; Dwarkesh Substack; Podcasting 2.0 RSS transcripts; yt-dlp YouTube
auto-subs; spoken.md paid API; Taddy paid GraphQL; pluggable Whisper providers).
Every source normalizes to the canonical `**Speaker** (MM:SS)` markdown shape,
caches to local SQLite + FTS5, and ships an MCP wrapper so agents can drive
the whole thing.

tools.name: episode_get
tools.description: Fetch one transcript by URL via the cookie -> free -> paid dispatch chain. Required: url. Returns the Transcript.

params.name: url
params.description: Episode URL (Dwarkesh, Huberman, Acquired, Founders, Peter Attia, YouTube, Apple, Spotify)

tools.name: episode_latest
tools.description: Pull the most recent episode for a subscribed feed. Optional: source. Returns the Transcript.

params.name: source
params.description: Source name (huberman / acquired / founders / peterattia / dwarkesh)
